title: Odisha weather alert: Intense heat, thunder & hailstorms likely over the next week! - Odisha TV

full_text:
Odisha is bracing for a series of weather events over the next few days, beginning with a severe warning on Thursday. According to the latest meteorological reports, residents can expect isolated heavy rainfall accompanied by hailstorms, thunderstorms, lightning, and gusty winds tomorrow.
The combination of these intense weather conditions is likely to create hazardous situations in several parts of the state, with the possibility of localized flooding, fallen trees, and disrupted services.
Weather Conditions Likely
As the week progresses, the weather conditions are set to ease slightly. On Day-2 (Friday) and Day-3 (Saturday), the state will experience isolated thunderstorms, lightning, and gusty winds. While not as severe as Day-1, these storms still pose a threat, particularly in the form of sudden downpours and powerful winds that could cause minor damage and power outages.

However, there is a brief reprieve on Day-4 (Sunday), with no weather warnings in effect. This temporary calm offers a short window of relief before the hot and humid conditions set in. From Day-5 (Monday) to Day-7 (Wednesday), the weather is expected to turn increasingly uncomfortable, with warnings of heat and humidity.
The oppressive conditions will likely lead to discomfort and health risks, especially for vulnerable populations such as the elderly and children.
As the state navigates through this erratic weather pattern, it's important for citizens to stay informed, prepare for unexpected storms, and take precautions to safeguard their health and well-being.
